Document:
# Sector Topology
The Colossus Sector topology consists of multiple rings and clusters for resources.
The area immediately around Colossus Central is mostly empty space. Beyond this, there are [bold]five distinct zones[/bold]:
- There are 2 clusters, [color=gold]INSO-357k[/color] & [color=maroon]LINEAR-21[/color]. They are significantly richer than the surrounding space, with one being a graveyard of scrap and the other a dense area of rock. - The [color=#fbf236]inner ring[/color] ([color=gold]~8.5–9 km[/color]) is a thin yet thick belt of asteroids and scrap. - The [color=#286c9c]outer cloud[/color] ([color=gold]~12–20 km[/color]) is less dense and older field, yet much wider to mine in, with a much more diverse set of asteroids and scrap.
Beyond this, the far ring continues indefinitely. Travellers entering this zone without sufficient preparation and means of threat management risk never returning again.
